<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Util\PHP; use PHPUnit\Event\Facade; use PHPUnit\Framework\ChildProcessResultProcessor; use PHPUnit\Framework\Test; use PHPUnit\Runner\CodeCoverage; use PHPUnit\TestRunner\TestResult\PassedTests; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final class JobRunnerRegistry { private static ?JobRunner $runner = null; public static function run(Job $job): Result { return self::runner()->run($job); } /** * @param non-empty-string $processResultFile */ public static function runTestJob(Job $job, string $processResultFile, Test $test): void { self::runner()->runTestJob($job, $processResultFile, $test); } public static function set(JobRunner $runner): void { self::$runner = $runner; } private static function runner(): JobRunner { if (self::$runner === null) { self::$runner = new DefaultJobRunner( new ChildProcessResultProcessor( Facade::instance(), Facade::emitter(), PassedTests::instance(), CodeCoverage::instance(), ), ); } return self::$runner; } }
